hero.title: The Traffic Bottleneck Ends Here
hero.subtitle: Clear congestion before it happens with
hero.description: Transform reactive traffic control into a proactive science. GridLock leverages graph simulation and ML fingerprinting to anticipate congestion spread, automatically dispatch fleets, and deploy barricades—all unified on MapMyIndia.

features.title: Everything you need for smarter cities
features.description: Built for scale. Designed for the chaos of real-world traffic management.

demo.title: The GridLock Pipeline in Action
demo.description: Watch our 10-step sequence flow seamlessly from event ingestion through machine learning prediction and kinematic fluid dynamics.

featuresList.bfsDesc: Simulates real-time queue spillback and congestion spread on a live road graph, mapping exactly where gridlock will hit next.
featuresList.mlDesc: Pattern-matches live incidents against thousands of historical analogues to instantly predict severity, duration, and clearance times.
featuresList.llmDesc: Large language models dynamically recommend optimal barricade placements and generate alternative routing strategies to choke off congestion.
featuresList.mmiDesc: Enterprise-grade geocoding and mapping infrastructure provides the highly accurate spatial context required for our AI simulations.

steps.detectDesc: Live data from city infrastructure flows into the platform, instantly highlighting anomalies and traffic buildup.
steps.anticipateDesc: The system forecasts congestion spread, recommending barricade deployments and resource allocation before gridlock occurs.
steps.dispatchDesc: Controllers issue routing orders and barricade plans. Fleet units receive them instantly on their MapMyIndia-powered mobile workspace.
steps.resolveDesc: Officers clear incidents on-site. The dashboard updates in real-time, restoring normal traffic flow patterns automatically.

howItWorks.title: From raw data to resolved incidents
howItWorks.description: Four seamless stages power the GridLock pipeline, end to end.

roleSelection.title: Select your workspace
roleSelection.description: Two dedicated interfaces. One unified mission.
roleSelection.controllerDesc: Full tactical view. Authorize barricades, verify ML fingerprints, and command the fleet in real-time.
roleSelection.fleetDesc: Mobile-first execution. Receive map-accurate dispatch orders and clear incidents on the ground.

footer.copyright: © 2026 GridLock. The traffic bottleneck ends here.

cta.title: Ready to transform your city's traffic?
cta.description: Join the growing network of municipalities using GridLock to build safer, faster, and smarter transportation systems.
